scripts.watch: while true; do clear; date; bun x cre workflow simulate ./ --target staging-settings --non-interactive --trigger-index 0 -R ./; bun x cre workflow simulate ./ --target staging-settings --non-interactive --trigger-index 1 -R ./; bun x cre workflow simulate ./ --target staging-settings --non-interactive --trigger-index 2 -R ./; sleep 15; done
